VD.title: Climatic Zones
VD.description: Humid sub-humid zone, located in the southern part of the Villa Hayes Department and at the confluence of the Pilcomayo and Paraguay Rivers.

AM.title: Climatic Zones
AM.description: Dry sub-humid zone, covering the central and northern areas of the Presidente Hayes Department and the eastern sector of the Alto Paraguay Department.

RS.title: Climatic Zones
RS.description: Semi-arid zone, covering western Alto Paraguay and the entire Boquerón Department.
